creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note from upstream issue:

ApacheDirectoryStudio 2.0.0-M14 is incompatible with latest Eclipse 2019-03.

After upgrading of Eclipse to version 2019-03 this problem arise again. We should use ApacheDirectoryStudio 2.0.0-M15, which implements patch of this bug, but it's unavailable yet.

Resolution is to use ApacheDirectoryStudio 2.0.0-M15 if possible (prior to release), or when it's released
